| # | Truth | Status | Evidence |
|---|-------|--------|----------|

| 2 | Chokepoint detail pages render the correct Sigma rules for every stage, regardless of array position | VERIFIED | `forloop.parentloop.index` absent from `_layouts/chokepoint.html`; conditions use `tier_lower` field-based matching at lines 1239-1256 |
| 3 | `jekyll build --strict` exits zero with no warnings | VERIFIED | Build completes in ~0.55s with `JEKYLL_EXIT:0`; `grep -iE "warning\|error"` returns no matches |

**Score:** 3/3 truths verified

## Gaps Summary

No gaps. All three roadmap success criteria satisfied:

1. `_data/chokepoints.yml`, `_chokepoints/`, and `assets/js/search-index.json` are confirmed gitignored and absent from `git ls-files` output.
2. `forloop.parentloop.index` is completely removed from `_layouts/chokepoint.html`; detection routing is field-based via `tier_lower` — correct for any stage array ordering.

Phase 1 goal is achieved. All downstream phases have a stable foundation.
